summary: Data Seeding Module testing completed. 19/19 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. System shows seeded data: 20 departments, 13 vendors, 48 items, 22 assets, 25 users. Seeded users can login with password '1234' and access all features.

minor.issue: Ward doctor (9876543210) may have different password if user existed before seeding - seeding skips existing users
minor.note: This is expected behavior - seeding preserves existing data

GET /api/seed/status - Requires authentication (returns 403)
POST /api/seed/all - Seeds all operational data successfully
POST /api/seed/all - Requires authentication (returns 403)
POST /api/seed/departments - Seeds departments only
POST /api/seed/vendors - Seeds vendors only
POST /api/seed/categories - Seeds categories only
Seeded departments verified (ADMIN, EMRG, OPD, WARD, ICU, LAB, RAD, PHRM, STORE, etc.)
Seeded vendors verified (VMED01, VLAB01, VRAD01, VBIO01, VEQP01, VCLN01, VSRG01, VFAC01)
Seeded items verified (CBC, Blood Sugar, X-Ray, Paracetamol, etc.)
Seeded assets verified (Ventilator, Monitor, Defibrillator, etc.)
Seeded users verified (multiple departments)
Login with seeded ICU consultant (9876543220, password 1234) - SUCCESS
Login with seeded lab technician (9876543240, password 1234) - SUCCESS
Login with seeded pharmacist (9876543260, password 1234) - SUCCESS

Seeded user can access orderable items API
Dispatch queue accessible by seeded user
Data Seed page loads with status counts

Admin Setup - Departments tab shows 20 seeded departments

Admin Setup - Vendors tab shows 13 seeded vendors
Admin Setup - Assets tab shows 22 seeded assets
Create Order page shows seeded items (Paracetamol, CBC, X-Ray, etc.)

seed_data_creation: System already seeded with: 20 departments, 13 vendors, 48 items, 22 assets, 25 users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data seeding module fully functional. The /api/seed endpoints create: 14 base departments, 8 vendors, 7 categories, 45+ items, 20 assets, 22 users. All seeded users have password '1234'. Ward doctor (9876543210) may have different password if created before seeding. Use ICU consultant (9876543220) or other seeded users for testing. Data Seed page at /data-seed shows status and allows re-seeding. Admin Setup at /admin shows all seeded data in tabs.

data_seed_page.status_card: Shows departments, vendors, categories, items, assets, users counts
data_seed_page.seed_button: Seed All Operational Data button triggers /api/seed/all

dispatch_queue.shows_pending: Items pending for user's dispatching department
